cards.title: Correctness
cards.governance_note: Define correctness relative to a specification, not vague success.

cards.title: Preconditions and Postconditions
cards.governance_note: State assumptions and required outputs before evaluating an algorithm.

cards.title: Invariants
cards.governance_note: Identify what must remain true across execution or system transitions.

cards.title: Counterexamples
cards.governance_note: Treat failures as evidence that strengthens specifications and tests.
